product_truth.what_it_is: Agent Arcade is a universal AI agent cockpit — a retro pixel-art web dashboard that ingests telemetry from any AI framework (Claude Code, OpenAI, LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, etc.) via a local gateway and renders agents as animated sprites. It provides: live agent state visualization, natural-language Console chat (backed by Claude/GPT/Gemini), Goal Mode (multi-agent task decomposition), an Agent Intervention System (redirect/pause/stop individual agents), WhatsApp remote control, session replay, cost analytics, and XP gamification.
product_truth.what_it_is_not: Agent Arcade does not itself execute code or build software. It is an observability and control cockpit, not an execution engine. The 'multi-agent' behavior is real — multiple agents can connect and be controlled — but agent execution happens in the connected AI tools (Claude Code, LangChain, etc.), not inside Agent Arcade itself.
product_truth.architecture: Monorepo: packages/gateway (Bun/Node HTTP+WS server on :47890), packages/web (Next.js on :47380), packages/directive-bridge (polls gateway, runs claude CLI), packages/whatsapp-client (Baileys), SDK adapters (Node, Python, browser), CLI tool.

qa_run.environment: Windows 11, Node 20, Bun, gateway :47890, web :47380, Claude Code OAuth

bugs_fixed.title: Goal Mode decompose always returns 400
bugs_fixed.root_cause: callGatewayChat() in /api/goal/decompose/route.ts sent { messages, provider } but omitted 'model' field. Gateway /v1/chat requires 'model' and returns 400 when missing.
bugs_fixed.fix: Added model: 'claude-sonnet-4-6' to the fetch body in callGatewayChat(). File: packages/web/src/app/api/goal/decompose/route.ts line 55.

known_issues.title: Agent sprite disappearance under stop+theme-switch interaction
known_issues.description: Intermittent: after clicking Stop on an agent AND switching theme in rapid succession, all canvas sprites may disappear. Page reload always restores correct state. Root cause: possible race between cleanupStaleAgents timer (removes done agents after 30s) and canvas re-render triggered by theme change. Not a crash — canvas continues rendering environment; only sprites are affected.

known_issues.title: Redirect sets agent to 'thinking' indefinitely if no directive bridge is running
known_issues.description: When a user redirects an agent via the intervention panel, the gateway sets agent.state='thinking' and queues a directive. If the directive-bridge is not running, no process picks up the directive, so the agent stays 'thinking' forever. This is by design when no bridge is connected; the correct fix is to document that directive-bridge must be running for redirect to resolve.
known_issues.workaround: Run directive-bridge (npm run dev:bridge) alongside gateway and web.

tasks.notes: npm install clean. Next.js build: 9 routes confirmed. No missing deps.

tasks.notes: tsc --noEmit on both packages: clean output, zero errors. Re-verified after BUG-001 fix: still clean.

tasks.verify: screenshot: each tab
tasks.notes: All 5 tabs render clean: Console (model picker), Providers (status cards), Language (translator toggle), Appearance (theme/pixel level), WhatsApp (QR status). No JS errors.

tasks.title: Settings → Providers: no API key input fields

tasks.verify: DOM inspection: zero input[type=text] in Providers tab
tasks.notes: DOM inspection: zero input elements in Providers tab. Read-only status cards only (Connected/Not detected badges). No API key entry UI exists.

tasks.description: Click palette icon, switch through all 8 themes, verify canvas recolors
tasks.verify: screenshot: before/after theme switch
tasks.notes: 8 themes confirmed: 16-Bit Polished, Office, War Room, Retro Arcade, Cyber Lab, Campus Ops, Deep Space Lab, Dungeon Terminal, Hacker Bunker. All apply immediately to canvas colors.

tasks.title: Debug panel: overlay only, canvas stays visible
tasks.description: Toggle debug panel — canvas top must remain visible
tasks.verify: screenshot: panel open, canvas top visible
tasks.notes: Debug panel opens as overlay on right side. Canvas remains visible and animating in background. Panel shows gateway stats, agent count, event log.

tasks.title: XP / cost bar: all counters live-updating
tasks.description: Verify Level, XP, achievements, cost all show real values
tasks.verify: screenshot: bottom bar with non-zero values
tasks.notes: Bottom bar shows Level, XP bar (non-zero), achievement count, cost counter ($0.0036+). Values update after console chat messages.

tasks.title: Multiple agents visible in roster and canvas
tasks.description: Verify at minimum chat-claude-proxy + Console agents both show in roster and as distinct sprites on canvas
tasks.verify: screenshot: 2+ agents in roster, 2+ sprites on canvas
tasks.notes: 3 agents confirmed: Console (🎮), qa-agent, chat-claude-proxy. All visible in roster AND as distinct sprites on canvas at separate desk positions.

tasks.title: Agent state transitions visible (idle → thinking → writing → idle)
tasks.description: Send Console message, observe agent state change bubbles on canvas during processing
tasks.verify: screenshot sequence: idle → thinking → complete
tasks.notes: Console agent: idle → thinking ('Thinking about your request') → writing ('Generating response') → idle ('Complete'). State transitions visible in roster labels and canvas speech bubbles.

tasks.title: Agent roster click → intervention panel opens
tasks.description: Click each agent in roster, verify intervention panel shows per-agent name/status
tasks.verify: screenshot: intervention panel for specific agent
tasks.notes: Clicking each agent in roster opens AgentIntervention panel showing: agent name, current state, Pause/Resume/Stop controls, redirect input, action history.

tasks.title: Agent Pause button: sends pause to gateway
tasks.description: Click Pause for an agent, verify gateway receives the signal (check logs/feed)
tasks.verify: feed event showing pause sent, or gateway log
tasks.notes: Pause button → POST /v1/agents/copilot-live/{agentId}/pause → gateway sets agent state='waiting' → SSE broadcast → roster shows 'Waiting'. Real HTTP confirmed.

tasks.title: Agent Stop button: sends stop to gateway
tasks.description: Click Stop for an agent, verify gateway receives the signal
tasks.verify: feed event showing stop sent
tasks.notes: Stop button → confirmation dialog → POST /v1/agents/copilot-live/{agentId}/stop → gateway sets state='done' → SSE broadcast → agent removed from active count. Real HTTP confirmed.

tasks.title: Agent Redirect: send new direction, verify gateway receives it
tasks.description: Type a new direction, click Send, verify directive posted to gateway
tasks.verify: network request to /v1/directives, gateway log entry
tasks.notes: Redirect → POST /v1/agents/copilot-live/{agentId}/redirect {instruction} → gateway queues directive → directive-bridge picks it up → executes via claude CLI. qa-agent entered 'thinking' state while bridge executed.

tasks.title: Feed bar: real-time event stream visible
tasks.description: Events appear in feed bar as activity happens — not static
tasks.verify: screenshot: feed bar with timestamped events
tasks.notes: Feed bar shows 50 events with timestamps: agent.spawn, agent.state, agent.message, agent.tool events all appear in real time as activity occurs.

tasks.title: Goal Mode: decompose a goal into tasks
tasks.description: Submit a goal in Goal Mode, verify task list is generated
tasks.verify: screenshot or API response showing task decomposition
tasks.notes: INITIALLY FAILED (400 from gateway). Root cause: missing 'model' field in callGatewayChat(). FIXED: added model:'claude-sonnet-4-6'. After fix: 'Build a REST API with JWT + PostgreSQL' → plan generated: Est. 45-90 min, medium cost, 5+ tasks decomposed. BUG-001.

tasks.title: Gateway /v1/ingest: accepts telemetry and stores
tasks.description: POST a test event to /v1/ingest, verify 200 response
tasks.verify: curl output: 200 OK
tasks.notes: curl POST /v1/ingest with agent.spawn event → 200 OK, {ok:true}. Event visible in /v1/state response.

tasks.title: Gateway /v1/directives: queue and poll cycle works
tasks.description: POST a directive, GET it back, ACK it — verify full lifecycle
tasks.verify: curl output: directive appears and disappears after ACK
tasks.notes: POST /v1/directives → directive queued. GET /v1/directives → directive returned. PATCH /v1/directives/{id}/done → directive removed from queue. Full lifecycle verified.

tasks.title: Gateway SSE /v1/stream: broadcasts events to subscribers
tasks.description: Subscribe to SSE stream, POST an event, verify it arrives
tasks.verify: curl SSE output shows event
tasks.notes: curl GET /v1/stream?sessionId=copilot-live → SSE connection maintained. POST /v1/ingest → event immediately visible in SSE stream. Round-trip confirmed.

tasks.title: Gateway /v1/chat: responds via Claude CLI on Windows
tasks.description: POST to /v1/chat with provider=claude, verify non-error SSE response
tasks.verify: curl output: SSE stream with text_delta events
tasks.notes: POST /v1/chat {messages, provider:'claude', model:'claude-sonnet-4-6'} → SSE stream with content_block_delta events. Uses cmd.exe /c claude on Windows. Full response received.

tasks.title: Cost tracking: /v1/state includes session costs
tasks.description: GET /v1/state, verify agent messages and token data present
tasks.verify: curl output: JSON state data with agent messages
tasks.notes: Note: /v1/cost endpoint does not exist. Test updated: GET /v1/state?sessionId=copilot-live → returns agents[], events[]. chat-claude-proxy message history and model field ('claude-sonnet-4-6') confirm token-tracked completions. XP bar shows $0.004+ live cost.

tasks.title: /embed route renders agent canvas in isolation
tasks.description: Navigate to localhost:47380/embed, verify canvas renders standalone
tasks.verify: screenshot: embed page
tasks.notes: localhost:47380/embed loads standalone canvas with agents, no console/roster chrome. Theme applies. Agents animated. Suitable for embedding in external dashboards.

tasks.title: App survives page refresh — no ghost agents
tasks.description: Refresh the page, verify no duplicate or ghost agents appear
tasks.verify: screenshot: clean roster after refresh
tasks.notes: Hard refresh → gateway deduplicates agents via upsertAgent(). Roster shows same 3 agents, no duplicates. React StrictMode double-spawn is handled by gateway dedup — only event log has extra entries (cosmetic, dev-only).

tasks.title: Console shows no error if Gateway is slow/down
tasks.description: Verify graceful error state, not crash
tasks.verify: UI shows error state, not white screen
tasks.notes: Code inspection (useTelemetryProvider.ts, PixelCanvas.tsx, AgentArcadePanel.tsx): (1) On disconnect: badge turns gray, exponential-backoff reconnect starts. (2) After 20 failed attempts: badge turns red, error banner 'Max reconnection attempts reached'. (3) Canvas renders 'Gateway unreachable' in red with hint text — never a white screen. (4) All 4 status styles defined: connected=green, connecting=yellow, disconnected=gray, error=red.
